nodes.name: Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL
1. CONFIGURATION
nodes.notes: This node holds all the settings for your appointment setter's availability.

nodes.name: 2. Get Calendar Events
nodes.notes:
1. Select your Google Account from the 'Credential' dropdown.

2. Select the calendar you want to check for availability from the 'Calendar' dropdown list.

additionalFields.summary: ={{ $('Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL').item.json.body.message.toolCalls[0].function.arguments.serviceType || '' }} - {{ $('Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL').item.json.body.message.toolCalls[0].function.arguments.clientName || '' }} - {{ $('Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL').item.json.body.message.toolCalls[0].function.arguments.customerPhone || $('Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL').item.json.body.message.customer.number || '' }}

nodes.name: 3. Book Appointment in Calendar
nodes.notes:
1. Select your Google Account from the 'Credential' dropdown.

2. Select the **SAME** calendar you chose in the previous node to book the new appointment.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { "results": [ { "toolCallId": $('Webhook: Production URL = VAPI Server URL').item.json.body.message.toolCalls[0].id, "result": "The appointment has been successfully booked." } ] } }}

project.name: AutoShop Production
project.description:
Production workflows for AutoShop SMS AI platform.

Handles:
- inbound SMS
- AI conversation handling
- booking automation
- Google Calendar sync
- conversation closing logic

Core stack:
n8n + AI agent + SMS provider + Google Calendar

Used by AutoShop SaaS production environment.
